title: Meaty Springy Moroccan Shungiku Bissara
description: A hearty and flavorful Moroccan dish featuring shungiku, char-grill-yang, and a blend of spices, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal prep option. This fatty and springy bissara is a great way to enjoy a traditional Moroccan meal with a twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb shoulder and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, and paprika, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shungiku to the pot and cook until wilted, about 3 minutes.
Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
Serve with a side of whole grain bread or couscous, if desired.
